name: accounting-tax
description: Professional-grade accounting and tax automation for CPAs, bookkeepers, and finance professionals. Automates reconciliations, tax calculations, financial analysis, and compliance checks.

entryPoints.description: Reconcile bank statements with general ledger - auto-matches transactions, finds missing items, flags duplicates
Calculate tax liabilities and estimates - federal tax, self-employment, quarterly estimates with 2024 brackets
Analyze financial statements and ratios - profitability, liquidity, leverage analysis with variance detection
Check accounting compliance and standards - validates against GAAP and common audit triggers
Calculate depreciation schedules - straight-line, MACRS, declining balance for all property classes
Analyze budget vs actual variances - auto-flags significant variances (>10%), categorizes favorable/unfavorable

skills.name: Bank Reconciliation
skills.description: Automated GL to bank statement matching with tolerance settings
skills.example: claw.accounting.reconcile({ glAccount: data, bankStatement: stmt, tolerance: 0.01 })

skills.name: Tax Calculator
skills.description: Federal income tax with current year brackets and self-employment calculations

skills.name: Financial Analysis
skills.description: Complete ratio analysis with industry comparisons and trend detection
